title: Sabichi 189103 White Gloss 5 Speed Hand Mixer 120W
features: Easy to use this hand mixer is great for everyday use for all who love to bake from beginners to skilled experienced bakers.
It includes stylish chrome beaters that are easy to insert and eject for easy cleaning.
5 speed settings with a powerful 120W motor for smooth and easy use meaning a better mix and bake.
Built in safety function with an eject button for easy operation and speed selection.
Ideal for beginners and experienced bakers this handy mixer is a must for all who love to bake and it’s part of a fully coordinated collection.
description: Functional essential electrics in simple clean lines and bright gloss white. Essential yet stylish this mixer is a great addition to any budding bakers kitchen kit. With 5 speed settings it takes the strain out of mixing. Our white gloss essential collection is ideal for first time buyers.
